mapper.select: SELECT response_id , user_id , survey_id , start_at , completed_at , status_code , total_score , risk_profile_code , reg_dt FROM tbl_user_survey_response WHERE response_id = #{responseId}

SELECT r.response_id , r.user_id , r.survey_id , r.start_at , r.completed_at , r.status_code , r.total_score , r.risk_profile_code , r.reg_dt , ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tbl_user_survey_response WHERE survey_id = r.survey_id ) AS total_participants FROM tbl_user_survey_response r WHERE r.user_id = #{userId} AND r.response_id = ( SELECT response_id FROM tbl_user_survey_response WHERE user_id = r.user_id AND survey_id = r.survey_id ORDER BY reg_dt DESC LIMIT 1 )

SELECT response_id , user_id , survey_id , start_at , completed_at , status_code , total_score , risk_profile_code , reg_dt FROM tbl_user_survey_response WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND survey_id = #{surveyId} ORDER BY reg_dt DESC
